body:
## What this PR does / why we need it:

The release payload may ship multiple RHCOS variants (e.g. rhel-coreos
9.8 and rhel-coreos-10 10.2). ComponentVersions() can't be used because
it either errors on multiple machine-os versions or picks only one.

Extract all machine-os versions directly from the ImageStream tags and
verify the drifted node's OS image matches at least one of them.

Made-with: Cursor

## Which issue(s) this PR fixes:
<!--

Fixes

## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Tests**
  * Enhanced validation of machine OS versions during node upgrades to check compatibility against all available expected versions instead of a single version
  * Improved observability with additional logging of pre-upgrade node OS information and collected expected version values

<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
title: NO-JIRA: fix(e2e): handle dual RHCOS payloads in Karpenter drift OS image check
